metadata.name: gym-examples
metadata.summary: A custom environment for multi-agent reinforcement learning focused on WSN routing.

variables.name: gym_examples.envs.wsn_env.input_dim
documentation: length of the individual rewards vector

variables.name: gym_examples.envs.wsn_env.output_dim
documentation: final reward

variables.name: gym_examples.envs.wsn_env.Eelec
documentation: energy consumption per bit in joules

variables.name: gym_examples.envs.wsn_env.Eamp
documentation: energy consumption per bit per square meter in joules

variables.name: gym_examples.envs.wsn_env.info_amount
documentation: data size in bits

variables.name: gym_examples.envs.wsn_env.initial_energy
documentation: initial energy of each sensor (in joules)

variables.name: gym_examples.envs.wsn_env.lower_bound
documentation: lower bound of the sensor positions

variables.name: gym_examples.envs.wsn_env.upper_bound
documentation: upper bound of the sensor positions

variables.name: gym_examples.envs.wsn_env.base_station_position
documentation: position of the base station

variables.name: gym_examples.envs.wsn_env.initial_number_of_packets
documentation: initial number of packets to transmit

variables.name: gym_examples.envs.wsn_env.latency_per_hop
documentation: latency per hop in seconds

variables.name: gym_examples.envs.wsn_env.max_reward
documentation: maximum reward value when the sensors sent data to the base station. The opposite value is when the sensors perform an unauthorized action

variables.name: gym_examples.envs.wsn_env.net
documentation: Convert the weights to Double

classes.name: gym_examples.envs.wsn_env.Attention
documentation: Define the final reward function using an attention mechanism

methods.name: gym_examples.envs.wsn_env.WSNRoutingEnv.compute_angle_vectors
documentation: Compute the angle in radians between the vectors formed by (i, action) and (i, base station)

methods.name: gym_examples.envs.wsn_env.WSNRoutingEnv.compute_reward_angle
documentation: Compute the reward based on the angle between the vectors formed by (i, action) and (i, base station)

methods.name: gym_examples.envs.wsn_env.WSNRoutingEnv.compute_reward_distance
documentation: Compute the reward based on the distance to the next hop

methods.name: gym_examples.envs.wsn_env.WSNRoutingEnv.compute_reward_consumption_energy
documentation: Compute the reward based on the total energy consumption (transmission, reception)

methods.name: gym_examples.envs.wsn_env.WSNRoutingEnv.compute_reward_dispersion_remaining_energy
documentation: Compute the reward based on the standard deviation of the remaining energy

methods.name: gym_examples.envs.wsn_env.WSNRoutingEnv.compute_reward_number_of_packets
documentation: Compute the reward based on the number of packets of the receiver

methods.name: gym_examples.envs.wsn_env.WSNRoutingEnv.compute_individual_rewards
documentation: Compute the individual rewards

methods.name: gym_examples.envs.wsn_env.WSNRoutingEnv.network_reward_dispersion_remaining_energy
documentation: Compute the reward based on the standard deviation of the remaining energy at the network level

methods.name: gym_examples.envs.wsn_env.WSNRoutingEnv.network_reward_consumption_energy
documentation: Compute the reward based on the total energy consumption (transmission, reception) at the network level

methods.name: gym_examples.envs.wsn_env.WSNRoutingEnv.compute_reward_packet_delivery_ratio
documentation: Compute the reward based on the packet delivery ratio

methods.name: gym_examples.envs.wsn_env.WSNRoutingEnv.compute_reward_latency
documentation: Compute the reward based on the average latency

methods.name: gym_examples.envs.wsn_env.WSNRoutingEnv.compute_reward_network_throughput
documentation: Compute the reward based on the network throughput

methods.name: gym_examples.envs.wsn_env.WSNRoutingEnv.compute_attention_rewards
documentation: Compute the attention-based rewards

methods.name: gym_examples.envs.wsn_env.WSNRoutingEnv.integrate_mobility
documentation: Integrate the mobility of the sensors after each step

methods.name: gym_examples.envs.wsn_env.WSNRoutingEnv.to_base_n
documentation: Convert a number to a base-n number.

class_variables.name: gym_examples.envs.wsn_env.WSNRoutingEnv.ALGO_NAME
documentation: Global flag to control the algorithm name
